  • Uses of ResourceReservation in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.resource

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.resource that return types with arguments of type ResourceReservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ResourceReservation>>
    ResourceController.getMyActiveReservations(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Returns the caller's own currently active reservations on this resource.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ResourceReservation>>
    ResourceController.getReservationsForResource(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Returns all reservations of a resource (occupancy overview).
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceController.reserveResource(Long id, String fromIsoDate, String untilIsoDate, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Reserves a resource for a specific time span.

    Method
    Description
    List<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceReservationRepository.findActiveReservationsByUser(Long resourceId, Long userId, Instant now)
    Finds all reservations of a resource active at the point in time now, held by the given user.

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource that return types with arguments of type ResourceReservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceService.getMyActiveReservations(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Returns the reservations active at the point in time now that the given user holds on the resource.
    List<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceService.getReservationsForResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Returns all reservations of a resource (past, active and future) as an occupancy overview.
